Title: Library Management System
Abstract: A web-based application to manage the issuing and returning of books. Features include barcode scanning, fine calculation for late returns, and a student dashboard to search for books availability. Built using PHP and MySQL.

Title: Traffic Sign Recognition
Abstract: An AI project using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) to detect and classify traffic signs in real-time. The system uses a camera feed to identify stop signs, speed limits, and warnings to assist autonomous vehicles.

Title: Online Voting System
Abstract: A secure digital platform for college elections. It uses blockchain technology to ensure that votes cannot be tampered with. Students log in using their college ID and OTP to cast votes for the student council.

Title: Smart Home Automation
Abstract: An IoT-based solution to control home appliances using a mobile app. The system uses an Arduino board and Wi-Fi module to switch lights and fans on or off remotely. It also monitors temperature and humidity.

Title: E-Commerce Website for Handicrafts
Abstract: A marketplace platform specifically for local artisans to sell handmade goods. Features include a shopping cart, payment gateway integration, user reviews, and an admin panel for inventory management.

Title: Hospital Management System
Abstract: A desktop application to manage patient records, doctor appointments, and billing. The system maintains a database of patient history, prescriptions, and room availability to streamline hospital operations.

Title: Face Recognition Attendance System
Abstract: An automated attendance system that uses a classroom camera to capture student faces. It compares the faces with a database to mark attendance automatically, saving class time.

Title: Chatbot for College Enquiry
Abstract: A conversational AI bot integrated into the college website. It answers FAQs regarding admission fees, course syllabus, and exam dates using Natural Language Processing (NLP).

Title: Crypto Currency Price Tracker
Abstract: A mobile application that tracks real-time prices of Bitcoin and Ethereum. It provides graphical analysis of market trends and sends alerts when prices hit a target.

Title: Soil Moisture Sensor for Farmers
Abstract: An agricultural IoT project that detects soil moisture levels. It automatically turns on the water pump when the soil is dry and sends an SMS notification to the farmer.
